security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; frame-src http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Run a Circuit node — GPU inference or CPU agent hosting.
bundle.longDescription: Circuit Node turns your computer into part of the Circuit network. Lend an NVIDIA GPU to the decentralized inference mesh, or lend spare CPU to the agent cloud that hosts other people's agents — set a budget, click once, and earn. Wraps the same node-client the command-line install uses.
